body:
---
id: note-0102
date: 2025-08-25
topic: novamind-followup
mentions: [people/dev-shankar]
---

Circled back with [Dev Shankar](people/dev-shankar) this afternoon after sitting with the NovaMind deck for a few days. My initial read was cautious — their inference stack looked compelling on paper but I wasn't sure the energy efficiency claims held up at scale. Dev pushed back thoughtfully, walked me through the updated benchmarks from their Q2 colocation trials. Numbers are more credible than I expected.

What's sticking with me is their cooling architecture. If it performs the way they're projecting at 50MW+, that's a genuine differentiator in a market where thermal management is quietly becoming the constraint everyone underestimates. The climate angle here isn't incidental — it's structural.

Still want to see the PUE data independently verified before we move toward a term sheet. Flagged that clearly to Dev. But the conviction is building. Worth bringing to the full partnership call next week.
